title: vitis gilvotomentosa
intro: Vitis gilvotomentosa is a species of grapevine native to China, known for its unique, hairy leaves and small, purple grapes. The medicinal properties of Vitis gilvotomentosa lie in its flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to protect against cardiovascular disease, improve cognitive function, and provide antimicrobial properties. Vitis gilvotomentosa is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine, and its herbal preparations can be found in the form of teas, capsules, and extracts, often used to promote overall well-being and longevity.
